LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ALTERNATIVELY FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-18-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEARD, MEACHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1822 - 25TH STREET, S. F., CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
